current_read.title: Steve Yegge: "The Anthropic Hive Mind"
current_read.description: Veteran engineer Steve Yegge interviews approximately 40 Anthropic employees and describes how the company operates as a 'hive mind' running on vibes rather than traditional hierarchy, comparing their culture to improv theater's 'Yes, and...' approach and examining whether this organizational model can sustain rapid growth.

current_listen.title: Acquired: Taylor Swift episode
current_listen.description: An in-depth business analysis of Taylor Swift's empire, exploring how she became the biggest music artist of her generation and is reshaping the entire music industry through strategies like re-recording her original albums. Worth listening to understand the business and strategic decisions behind one of the most influential artists in modern music.
